About Nakshatra Namaha Creations

The team that builds
digital India's best business platforms.

Founded in Bengaluru in 2015, NNC is a full-stack digital agency with 35+ in-house specialists, four city offices and 565+ projects delivered for businesses across India and internationally.

Meet the team Founder's story

100% In-house
The founder's story

From a Bengaluru startup
to India's trusted
digital agency.

“I started NNC because I saw too many good businesses failing online — not because their products were bad, but because their digital presence did not reflect who they were.”

— Founder & Managing Director, Nakshatra Namaha Creations

In 2015, NNC was founded in Bengaluru with a single office, a small team and a clear conviction: every business deserves professional digital solutions built with care, accountability and real technical depth.

What started as a website development practice grew into a full-stack digital agency as clients returned asking for mobile apps, CRM systems, marketing campaigns and video production.

Today NNC operates from four cities with 35+ permanent team members and 565+ delivered projects. The founding principle has never changed.

10+
Years in digital industry
565+
Projects overseen
4
Offices built and scaled
35+
Team members hired & trained
What drives us

Our mission & vision

Our mission

To help businesses grow with smart and practical digital solutions. We deliver value through honest work, consistent quality and long-term support.

Honest workConsistent qualityLong-term support

Our vision

To be recognised as a trusted website and mobile app development company known for building meaningful digital experiences and result-oriented solutions.

Digital excellenceTrusted partnerMeaningful outcomes
Our journey

10 years of building digital India.

2015
Founded

NNC founded in Bengaluru

Nakshatra Namaha Creations was established in Bengaluru with a clear mission — to make professional digital solutions accessible to every growing Indian business.

2017
Expansion

First 100 projects delivered

Within two years, NNC delivered over 100 client projects. Client referrals became the primary source of new business.

2019
New services

Mobile app & video studio launched

NNC launched in-house mobile app development (React Native & Flutter) and a full video production studio.

2021
Growth

Mysuru & Hyderabad offices open

NNC expanded with new offices in Mysuru and Hyderabad. The team grew to 25+ members.

2023
Mumbai

Mumbai branch opens — 4 cities

NNC's Mumbai (Thane West) office completed the 4-city footprint. International projects commenced.

2025
Today

565+ projects. Expanding globally.

NNC has delivered 565+ digital projects and is expanding its international client base.

What we stand for

Six values that guide every project

Full accountability

Every project has one accountable team and one contact. We do not outsource, sub-contract or pass your work to a third party.

Performance first

Every website we build scores 90+ on Core Web Vitals. Speed, mobile-first architecture and SEO are built in from the first line of code.

Radical transparency

You know the scope, timeline and price before we start. No surprise invoices, no scope creep. Weekly progress reports, always.

Source code ownership

Your IP is yours. Full source code transfers to you on completion. No lock-in, no monthly licence fees.

In-house, always

35+ permanent, full-time specialists. Developers, designers, marketers, animators — all under one roof.

Long-term thinking

We build for scalability, maintainability and growth. A site that breaks under load in a year is not a success.

35+ specialists in-house

Full-time developers, designers, marketers, animators — all permanently employed.

4 offices — walk in anytime

Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Mumbai and Mysuru. Physical offices mean real accountability.

Modern tech stack

React JS, Node JS, PostgreSQL, AWS, React Native and Flutter.

565+ projects delivered

Every single one is live, verifiable and owned by the client.

Meet the team

The people who build your digital products.

Designers, developers, animators — all in-house, all accountable to you.
